calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Benge for Petitioner.

Mr. Benge stated that the action of estate distribution without Court approval was initiated by the Petitioner, that he (Counsel) attempted to rectify the matter with a status report and that he obtained waivers of account. Mr. Benge also stated that fees paid covered a number of different activities, explained work performed/services provided and stated that he will not be requiring fees for anything other than what has been reported. The Amended Petition for Order Approving Waiver of Accounting, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
